name: TATIANA BOWERS
seeking: Family therapists, group coaching facilitators, and business consultants for collaborative workshops, referral partnerships, and bundled coaching services for entrepreneurs with families.
who_you_serve: Individuals and businesses seeking to improve relationships, leadership, and achieve success.
what_you_do: Tatiana Bowers is a dynamic speaker and founder of Embrace Hope Counseling and Authentic Success, blending mental health and business expertise to inspire individuals and businesses to thrive.
offering: Speaking engagements on leadership, business, health & well-being, and relationship topics; therapy services; and business relationship facilitation.
bio: TATIANA BOWERS leads Authentic-Success. They specialize in Business Coaching, Business Consulting, Children and Family, Communication Training, Group Coaching.
business_focus: Tatiana Bowers is a dynamic speaker and founder of Embrace Hope Counseling and Authentic Success, blending mental health and business expertise to inspire individuals and businesses to thrive. (business relationships)

jv_history.source_quote: # Natasha Bowman, JD, SPHR’s Post Natasha Bowman, JD, SPHR Natasha Bowman, JD, SPHR is an Influencer ... So honored to have been the opening keynote speaker at the DC SHRM Annual Conference yesterday!
